title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/engine.py (第 1 至 120 行，共 775 行) ---
   1 | import json
   2 | import os
   3 | import re
   4 | from pathlib import Path
   5 | from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
   6 | import anthropic
   7 | import openai
   8 | import asyncio
   9 | from tools.base import BaseTool
  10 | from core.prompts import get_system_prompt
  11 | from core.context import ContextManager  # <--- 导入新管家
  12 | from core.context_assembler import ContextAssembler, ContextBudget
  13 | from core.memory_items import MemoryKind, ObservationType, RawObservation
  14 | from core.memory_manager import MemoryManager
  15 | 
  16 | # Git 自动化保险导入
  17 | from tools.git_tool import create_snapshot, rollback_to, has_uncommitted_changes, start_task_branch, finalize_task, start_plan_branch, finalize_plan
  18 | 
  19 | class AgentEngine:
  20 |     def __init__(self, tools: List[BaseTool], model: str, plan_manager, # <--- 传入管家
  21 |                  base_url: str = None, api_key: str = None,
  22 |                  max_history: int = 100, min_keep: int = 4, session_id="default",
  23 |                  memory_manager: Optional[MemoryManager] = None):
  24 |         self.tools = tools
  25 |         self.model = model
  26 |         self.plan_manager = plan_manager  # <--- 保存管家引用
  27 |         self.tool_map = {t.name: t for t in tools}
  28 |         self.tool_specs = [t.to_anthropic_spec() for t in tools]
  29 | 
  30 |         # --- 核心修改：使用 ContextManager 替代原有的 self.messages ---
  31 |         # 🔥 新增：传入 plan_manager，让压缩引擎能查询真实任务状态
  32 |         # 可注入共享 MemoryManager，使 tools 与上下文共用同一套长期记忆索引/缓存。
  33 |         self.context = ContextManager(
  34 |             max_history=max_history,
  35 |             min_keep=min_keep,
  36 |             plan_manager=plan_manager,
  37 |             memory_manager=memory_manager,
  38 |         )
  39 |         self.last_oa_msg = None
  40 |         self.session_id = session_id
  41 |         self.session_path = f"sessions/{session_id}.json"
  42 |         # ----------------------------------------------------------
  43 | 
  44 |         # ========== Git 自动化保险状态追踪 ==========
  45 |         self.edit_failures = {}  # {"file_path": failure_count}
  46 |         self.last_snapshot_plan_step = None  # 记录上次快照时的计划步骤
  47 |         self.current_plan_branch = None  # 当前 Plan 影子分支对应的 plan_id；必须先初始化，execute_query 会读取
  48 |         # Phase 5: Prompt 记忆注入预算配置
  49 |         self.memory_token_budget = 1500
  50 |         self.memory_recall_top_k = 8
  51 |         self.context_assembler = ContextAssembler(
  52 |             ContextBudget(memory=self.memory_token_budget)
  53 |         )
  54 | 
  55 |         self.is_openai_compat = base_url is not None or "claude" not in model.lower()
  56 | 
  57 |         # --- 异步适配：使用 Async 客户端 ---
  58 |         if self.is_openai_compat:
  59 |             self.client = openai.AsyncOpenAI(api_key=api_key or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"), base_url=base_url)
  60 |         else:
  61 |             self.client = anthropic.AsyncAnthropic(api_key=api_key or os.getenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"))
  62 | 
  63 |         os.makedirs("sessions", exist_ok=True)
  64 |         self.load_session()
  65 | 
  66 | 
  67 | 
  68 |     async def _call_llm(self, relevant_history: str = "", user_input: str = ""):
  69 |         """核心推理：改为异步调用"""
  70 |         current_plan = self.plan_manager.get_formatted_plan()
  71 | 
  72 |         # Phase 2/3: 获取三层记忆数据
  73 |         episodic_memories = self.context.episodic_memory.get_all() if self.context._enable_memory_layers else []
  74 |         session_summaries = self.context.session_summaries
  75 | 
  76 |         # 🔥🔥🔥 跨会话长期记忆检索：从磁盘检索所有会话的长期记忆
  77 |         long_term_memories = []
  78 |         if self.context._enable_memory_layers and user_input:
  79 |             try:
  80 |                 # 从长期记忆中检索与当前任务相关的摘要（跨所有会话）
  81 |                 long_term_memories = self.context.memory_manager.search_long_term(
  82 |                     query=user_input,
  ...
